h1: Custom Pullovers for Teams, Events, and Branded Apparel
metaDescription: Order custom pullovers in bulk for your team or event. Choose from hoodies, quarter zips, and crewnecks. Fast turnaround. Shop Perfect Imprints today.
introHtml:
Custom pullovers are a staple of any branded apparel program. Made from heavyweight cotton blends, performance fleece, and moisture-wicking synthetics, these garments offer durability and comfort for employees, event staff, and promotional giveaways. Whether you need a classic hoodie, a quarter-zip pullover, or a lightweight sun hoodie, the construction and fabric weight directly impact decoration quality and longevity.

For bulk orders, materials like poly-cotton blends and anti-pill fleece ensure your logo or text stays crisp through repeated washing. Decoration options include screen printing, embroidery, and heat transfer, each suited to different fabric types and design complexity. The Crosswind Quarter Zip and Jerzees NuBlend Hoodie are popular choices for corporate teams, while the Men's Dune Sun Hoodie works well for outdoor events.

When ordering custom pullovers, consider the intended use: crewnecks and hoodies for casual office wear or giveaways, quarter zips for a more polished uniform look, and sun hoodies for safety-conscious teams working outdoors. Minimum order quantities start at 12 pieces for most styles, with production lead times averaging 5–10 business days. Request a sample to verify material and fit before placing your full order.

faqs.q: What are the most popular decoration methods for pullovers?
faqs.a: Screen printing works best for bold logos on cotton or poly-cotton blends. Embroidery is ideal for quarter zips and fleece crewnecks. Full-color heat transfer is available for complex artwork on smooth-surface fabrics like performance fleece.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom pullovers?
faqs.a: Most styles have a minimum of 12 pieces. Some premium pullovers like the Boxercraft Sherpa may require 24 pieces. We can accommodate smaller orders for samples or pilot programs.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes. You can order a blank sample of any pullover to check material, color, and fit. Samples ship within 1–2 business days. For decorated samples, a setup fee may apply.

faqs.q: What are the typical production lead times?
faqs.a: Standard production takes 5–10 business days after artwork approval. Rush orders are available in 3–5 business days for an additional fee. Shipping time depends on your location and selected carrier.

faqs.q: How should I care for custom pullovers to ensure longevity?
faqs.a: Machine wash cold with like colors and tumble dry low. Avoid bleach and ironing directly over the decoration. For embroidered pullovers, turn inside out before washing to protect the threads.

heroAltText: Group of people wearing custom pullovers with embroidered logos, including hoodies and quarter-zip styles
